subcodes.first_line: I invoke Thee, oh My God, at the time that the Lamp of Unity will be lighted in the White Niche
subcodes.first_line_orig: انادیک حینئذ یا الهی حین الذی توقد سراج الاحدیه فی مشکاه البیضاء و یذوب هذا
subcodes.subjects: @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
